scripts.clean: shx rm -rf dist && npm run clean --workspaces
scripts.dev: concurrently --names "ai,agent,coding-agent,web-ui,tui" --prefix-colors "cyan,yellow,red,green,magenta" "cd packages/ai && npm run dev" "cd packages/agent && npm run dev" "cd packages/coding-agent && npm run dev" "cd packages/web-ui && npm run dev" "cd packages/tui && npm run dev"
scripts.dev:tsc: concurrently --names "ai,web-ui" --prefix-colors "cyan,green" "cd packages/ai && npm run dev:tsc" "cd packages/web-ui && npm run dev:tsc"
scripts.check: biome check --write --error-on-warnings . && npm run check:pinned-deps && npm run check:ts-imports && npm run check:shrinkwrap && tsgo --noEmit && node scripts/check-browser-smoke.mjs && node scripts/run-web-ui-check.mjs
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run clean && npm run build && npm run check
scripts.publish: npm run prepublishOnly && node scripts/prepare-senpi-bundled-workspaces.mjs && npm publish -ws --access public --tag latest --provenance
scripts.publish:dry: npm run prepublishOnly && node scripts/prepare-senpi-bundled-workspaces.mjs && npm publish -ws --access public --tag latest --provenance --dry-run
